question: What is your refund policy?
reference_answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all products. To initiate a refund, contact support@example.com with your order number. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.

question: What are your support hours?
reference_answer: Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST. Weekend support is available for enterprise customers with a premium support plan.

question: How long does shipping take?
reference_answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days within the continental US. Express shipping takes 2-3 business days. International shipping takes 10-14 business days depending on customs clearance.

question: How do I reset my password?
reference_answer: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your registered email address and you'll receive a password reset link within 5 minutes. The link expires after 1 hour.

question: What is the stock price of your company?
What is the API rate limit for your service?
reference_answer: The API rate limit is 1,000 requests per minute for the standard tier and 10,000 requests per minute for the enterprise tier. Rate limits reset every minute.

question: How long do you keep my data?
reference_answer: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. After account deletion, data is permanently removed within 30 days. Backup retention extends to 90 days for disaster recovery purposes.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
reference_answer: You can cancel your subscription from the Settings > Billing page. Click 'Cancel Subscription' and confirm. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period. No partial refunds are issued.

question: ¿Cómo restablezco mi contraseña?
reference_answer: Para restablecer su contraseña, haga clic en 'Olvidé mi contraseña' en la página de inicio de sesión. Ingrese su correo electrónico registrado y recibirá un enlace de restablecimiento en 5 minutos. El enlace expira después de 1 hora.
